title: Proclamation No. 626, s. 1940
text:
MALACAÑAN PALACE MANILA

PROCLAMATION NO. 626

REVOKING PROCLAMATION NO. 25, DATED MAY 23, 1925, AND RESERVING THE PARCELS OF LAND COVERED THEREBY FOR INCINERATOR AND POUND PURPOSES.

Upon the recommendation of the Secretary of Agriculture and Commerce, I hereby revoke Proclamation Numbered Twenty-five, dated May twenty-three, nineteen hundred and twenty-five, and reserve, pursuant to the provisions of section eighty-three of Commonwealth Act Numbered One hundred forty-one, as amended, for incinerator and pound purposes, under the administration of the City of Davao, subject to private rights, if any there be, the following parcels of the public domain, situated in the City of Davao, island of Mindanao, and more particularly described in the Bureau of Lands plan Swo-16563, to wit:

Beginning at a point marked 1 on Bureau of Lands plan Swo-16563, S. 76° 23′ W. 611.10 m., more or less, from Mon. 6, Davao Town site, thence N. 5° 03′ E. 62.28 m. to point 2; S. 63° 36′ E. 156.37 m. to point 3; S. 67° 22 W. 183.94 m. to point 4; S. 67° 22′ W. 4.28 m. to point 5; N. 19° 25′ E. 84.77 m. to point 1, point of beginning.

Containing an area of 10,459 square meters.

Point 5, P. C. concrete monument; and the rest are P. L. S./B. L. concrete monuments.

Bounded on the northeast by lot No. 1101; on the southeast, by lot No. 527; and on the northwest, by road.

Bearings true. Declination 1° 50′ E.

Points referred to are marked on Bureau of Lands plan Swo-16563, sheet No. 1.

Surveyed: February 6, 1923.

Approved: April 21, 1923.

NOTE.—This lot is equal to lot No. 1102, Davao Cad. No 102.

Lot No. 475-A. —A parcel of land (lot No. 475-A of the subdivision plan Swo-16563, being a portion of lot No. 475 of the cadastral survey of Davao, G. L. R. O. Cad. Record No. 317) situated in the Poblacion, municipality of Davao, Province of Davao. Bounded on the N. by lot No. 1219; on the NE., by lot No. 475-C of the subdivision plan; on the SE., by lot No. 475-A of the subdivision plan; on the S., by lot No. 475-B of the subdivision plan; and on the SW., by lot No. 1213. Beginning at a point marked “1” on plan, being S. 13° 52′ E., 1,175.40 m., more or less, from B. L. L. M. No. 15, Davao Cad. No. 102.

NOTE:-Lot No. 475-B=Lot No. 1221 of Davao Cad. No. 102.

Lot No. 475-C. —A parcel of land (lot No. 475-C of the subdivision plan Swo-16563, being a portion of lot No. 475 of the cadastral survey of Davao, G. L. R. O. Cad. Record No. 317), situated in the Poblacion, municipality of Davao, Province of Davao. Bounded on the N. by lot No. 1218; on the SE., by lot No. 476-B of the subdivision plan; and on the SW., by lot No. 475-A of the subdivision plan. Beginning at a point marked “1” on plan, being N. 89° 47′ W., 643.90 m., more or less, from Mon. No. 6, Davao Cad. No. 102, thence N. 86° 26′ E., 9.00 m. to point “2”; thence S. 26° 18′ W., 9.09 m. to point “3”; thence N. 32° 51′ W., 9.03 m. to point of beginning; containing an area of thirty-five square meters (35), more or less. All points referred to are indicated on the plan; and on the ground, point “2” is marked by old monument; and the rest are P. L. S. concrete monuments; bearings true; declination 2° 09′ E.; date of the original survey, February, 1916-May, 1920 and that of the subdivision survey, April 6, 8 and 22, 1931.

Note:—Lot No. 475-C = Lot No. 1222 of Davao Cad. No. 102.

Lot No. 476-A. — A parcel of land (lot No. 476-A of the subdivision plan Swo-16563, being a portion of lot No. 476 of the cadastral survey of Davao, G. L. R. O. Cad. Record No. 317), situated in the Poblacion, municipality of Davao, Province of Davao. Bounded on the NE. by lot No. 476-B of the subdivision plan; on the S., by lot No. 476-B of tin subdivision plan; and on the NW, by lot No. 475-A of the subdivision plan. Beginning at a point marked “1” on plan, being S. 26° 51′ E., 1,287.90 m., more or less, from B. L. L. M. No. 15, Davao Cad. No. 102, thence S. 89° 04′ W., 20.77 m. to point “2”; thence N. 26° 18′ E., 20.55 m. to point “3”; thence S. 32° 51′ E., 21.52 m. to point of beginning; containing an area of one hundred ninety square meters (190), more or less. All points referred to are indicated on the plan; and on the ground, point “1” is marked by old concrete monument; and the rest, by P. L. S. concrete monuments; bearings true; declination 2° 09′ E.; date of the original survey, February, 1916-May, 1920 and that of the subdivision survey, April 6, 8 and 22, 1931.

NOTE:—Lot No. 476-A = Lot No. 1223 of Davao Cad. No. 102.

Lot No. 476-B. —A parcel of land (lot No. 476-B of the subdivision plan Swo-16563, being a portion of lot No. 476 of the cadastral survey of Davao, G. L. R. O. Cad. Record No. 317), situated in the Poblacion, municipality of Davao, Province of Davao. Bounded on the N. by lot No. 476-A of the subdivision plan; on the NE., and SE., by provincial road; on the SW., by lot No. 1211; and on the NW., by lots Nos. 475-B, 476-A and 475-C of the subdivision plan. Beginning at a point marked “1” on plan, being N. 89° 44′ W., 634.92 m., more or less, from Mon. No. 6, Davao Cad. No. 102. thence S. 19° 48′ E., 92.20 m. to point “2”; thence S. 5° 05′-W., 57.32 m. to point “3”; thence S. 17° 19′ W., 83.15 m. to point “4” thence N. 64° 32′ W., 100.13 m. to point “5” thence N. 26° 18′ E., 171.32 m. to point “6” thence N. 89° 04′ E., 20.77 m. to point “7”; thence N. 32 51 W., 21.52 m. to point “8”; thence N. 26° 18′ E., 9.09 m. to point of beginning; containing an area of thirteen thousand seven hundred ninety-nine square meters (13,799), more or less.

All points referred to are indicated on the plan; and on the ground, point “1” is marked by old monument; points “2”, “3” and “4”, by old B. L. concrete monuments; point “5”, by old cross on tree; point “7”, by old concrete monument; and the rest, by P. L. S. concrete monuments; bearings true; declination 2° 09′ E.; date of the original survey, February, 1916-May, 1920 and that of the subdivision survey, April 6, 8 and 22, 1931.

NOTE.—Lot No. 476-B=Lot No. 1224 of Davao Cad. No. 102.

In witness whereof, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Commonwealth of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done at the City of Manila, this eighth day of October, in the year of Our Lord, nineteen hundred and forty, and of the Commonwealth of the Philippines, the fifth.

MANUEL L. QUEZON President of the Philippines

By the President: JORGE B. VARGAS Secretary to the President

Source: Presidential Museum and Library
